case_title: WESTERN MART CO. VS. ARBEK MANUFACTURING, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT ARBEK MANUFACTURING,INC.'S NOTICE OF GENARAL ASSIGNMENT FOR THE BENEFIT OF CREDITORS. FILED BY DEFENDANT ARBEK MANUFACTURING, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-21-2003 IN DEPT. 503 - ORDERED ASSIGNED TO 503 FOR TRIAL BY COURT. APPEARANCE BY THOMAS CAUDILL,ESQ. ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED, DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. PLAINTIFF RESTS. THE COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $25,704.48.
